scripts.cf:deploy: NUXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_WORKER_URL=https://thinkgraph-collab.cloudflare-e53.workers.dev NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt prepare && NUXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_WORKER_URL=https://thinkgraph-collab.cloudflare-e53.workers.dev NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/ --commit-dirty=true
scripts.cf:preview: NUXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_WORKER_URL=https://thinkgraph-collab.cloudflare-e53.workers.dev NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt prepare && NUXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_WORKER_URL=https://thinkgraph-collab.cloudflare-e53.workers.dev NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/ --branch preview --commit-dirty=true
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply thinkgraph-db --local
